channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-23
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: EBA updates Pillar 3 disclosure requirements on ESG risks, equity and shadow banking exposures, as part of simplification effort
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) has published today its final draft Implementing Technical Standards (ITS) amending the Pillar 3 disclosure framework on environmental, social and governance (ESG) risks, and introducing disclosure requirements on equity and shadow banking exposures. The package finalises the implementation of the disclosure requirements introduced by the Capital Requirements Regulation (CRR 3). Developed in line with the EU’s simplification agenda and the Omnibus package, the ITS streamline existing requirements, and enhance usability and consistency. — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: Latest EBA MREL dashboard shows that MREL requirements range from 25% to 29% of risk-weighted assets, depending on bank category, while bail-in remains the preferred resolution strategy
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published its latest semi-annual dashboard on the minimum requirement for own funds and eligible liabilities (MREL), providing an update on the state of resolution planning and on the resources that banks are using to meet their requirements. As of December 2025, bail-in remains the preferred resolution strategy in terms of risk-weighed assets (RWAs), while rollover needs reach EUR 231 billion for instruments set to become ineligible over the next 12 months. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact marché.

item.title: Press release - MEPs back modernised EU-Mexico partnership
item.description: On Tuesday, the Foreign Affairs and International Trade committees endorsed the upgraded EU-Mexico partnership, paving the way for closer political ties and expanded trade. Committee on Foreign Affairs Committee on International Trade Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact énergie / commerce.

item.title: Press release - Combating child sexual abuse: agreement on updated rules
item.description: To combat child sexual abuse crimes more effectively, an updated EU directive criminalises new technological offences and extends the limitation periods for prosecuting crimes. Committee on Civil Liberties, Justice and Home Affairs Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: Supervision de l’assurance : « L’assureur ou le distributeur doit toujours s’attacher à une exacte prise en compte des intérêts du client », insiste le vice-président de l’ACPR - L'Argus de l'assurance
